name: io.github.trippyogi/gitworthy
description: is it worth your commit? A pre-flight tool for OSS contribution targets: checks whether an issue is already done, in flight, fixed but unreleased, duplicated, or genuinely open.

environmentVariables.description: GitHub personal access token (fine-grained, read-only public repos). Optional; raises API rate limit from 60 to 5000 requests/hour.
environmentVariables.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
